aeo_readiness.summary: The business has potential to be cited by AI assistants but lacks structured content and authority signals to ensure consistent visibility in AI-driven search results.
quick_wins: Implement LocalBusiness schema markup to provide clear business information to AI models.
Create and mark up an FAQ section with structured data to address common HVAC queries.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is operational with photos and hours listed, but missing reviews and posts to enhance engagement and visibility.
critical_issues: No customer reviews, which impacts trust and search ranking.
Lack of regular posts or Q&A engagement to keep the profile active and informative.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected, ensuring reliable business information across platforms.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Consider adding additional citations on niche HVAC directories for broader coverage.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for HVAC tips and guides

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and authority signals to make the business stand out in AI search results.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to emergency HVAC services in Pasadena and Hollywood.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness and FAQ schema to provide clear, structured information to AI models.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, partnerships, and detailed expertise in HVAC services to establish authority.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for answer engines and AI search.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they are missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI-assisted searches.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks critical schema markup and authority signals, making it less likely to be cited by AI models.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates structured data, authority building, and conversational content to ensure the business is visible and recommended by AI assistants.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search, so acting now is crucial to stay ahead.

opening_line: We analyzed your website and found significant opportunities to enhance your visibility with AI assistants like ChatGPT and Claude.
